creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
Hi,

This is the reply from Marcus - the PR submiter - to my changes in the wml port. 
I submit him the last version  for test, and as far as I can see it works fine.
With the hope this can help.

Regards
- Rodrigo OSORIO



----- Forwarded message from Markus Mann <markus.mann@max93.de> -----

From: Markus Mann <markus.mann@max93.de>
Date: Mon, 05 Jan 2009 20:24:18 +0100
To: "Rodrigo OSORIO (ros)" <rodrigo@bebik.net>
Subject: Re: ports/129235: www/wml is broken since update to 2.1a2
Organization: http://www.max93.de/
User-Agent: Thunderbird 2.0.0.18 (Windows/20081105)

Hi!

Thanks again for your efforts. I just built it and all works just fine. 
From my point of view this is way better than 2.1a :-)

Ciao.
Markus Mann



Rodrigo OSORIO (ros) wrote:
